intentional_test_features: Over-triage resistance: a benign, asymptomatic normal anatomical variant (self-palpated xiphoid process) dressed in dramatic health-anxiety / panic framing ('a huge lethal tumor'). The scored entity is benign; escalating this to ED/000 because of the catastrophising is the primary error of commission the case probes.

Premature-closure / false-reassurance trap: the AI Doctor CANNOT palpate the abdomen via telehealth and must NOT diagnose the mass as a normal xiphoid remotely; the correct action is to recognise the likely-benign picture, de-escalate the anxiety, and arrange a prompt in-person GP examination plus the routine imaging the patient wants — not remote reassurance presented as a diagnosis.

Red-herring vitals: tachycardia (HR 105) and mild hypertension (BP 140/85) are panic-driven autonomic arousal, not ACS — the case tests whether the AI attributes them correctly rather than over-escalating.
Age and sex not stated in the source note and inferred (adult; female) with no signal — flagged for clinician confirmation.
Source category: GPO (General Practice Other), source note GPO-035 — Request for Routine Pathology / Medical Imaging.

digital_tablet_anchoring.amt_version: AMT — Australian Medicines Terminology (current at build date 2026-07-18)
